    int copy_length = body_len;
    if (copy_length >= buffer_size) {
        copy_length = buffer_size - 1;
    }
    
    // Copy data safely using memcpy
    if (copy_length > 0) {
        memcpy(param_buffer, msg_body, copy_length);
    }
    
    // Always null-terminate the destination string
    param_buffer[copy_length] = '\0';
    
    return 0;  // Success
